top_signals.title: Oil Prices Steady as Traders Assess US-Iran Truce Reports
top_signals.summary: Oil prices were little changed after a volatile trading day as traders digested news that the US and Iran have reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire and work toward a pact to end the war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
